name: animplayer
description: Browser-based AGV animation player. Reads the JSON produced by cpicker (NODES + SEQUENCE with actions). Animates one AGV travelling the sequence with trolley attach/detach logic.

files.web/animplayer.html: Entry point. Canvas + top load bar + bottom player toolbar.
files.web/animplayer.js: Animation engine: sequence walker, AGV interpolation, trolley state, render loop.
files.web/shared.js: Shared coord math, drawing utilities (same file as cpicker).

input_schema.source: JSON file produced by cpicker (drag-drop or top-bar file picker)
input_schema.backward_compat: Plain-string SEQUENCE entries treated as {node: str, action: 'move'}
input_schema.background_image: PNG loaded separately via top-bar file picker — same plant_layout.png used in cpicker

animation_engine.time_scale: dt * speedMultiplier before passing to simulation
animation_engine.coordinate_space: All simulation in image-pixel space; ViewState (offsetX/Y/zoom) applied only at draw time

sequence_walker.description: State machine that walks SEQUENCE entries, drives AGV movement and trolley state.

initial_state.note: Starts in action_pause so the first node's action is performed immediately (duration 0 for 'move')

action_pause.desc: AGV holds at current node for actionDurationFor(action) seconds

moving.desc: AGV interpolates toward nodes[sequence[currentStep]] using advanceAlongPath
moving.path: [agvPos (current), target node pos] — direct straight-line between consecutive nodes
moving.heading_update: Computed from direction vector: atan2(dy, dx) in degrees

done.desc: Animation complete. AGV stops. Restart button resets to initial state.

trolley_effects.exchange: trolleyPos = { ...currentNodePos } at midpoint, then trolleyState = 'carrying'; trolleyPos = null

sequence_walker.future_scrubber_hook: seekToStep(n) method resets state and replays through n steps instantly (at infinite speed). totalSteps getter returns sequence.length.

draw_order: 3. Sequence path lines — magenta polyline in node order
4. Node dots + heading arrows + labels (optional toggle)
5. Active node pulse ring — white pulsing circle on current target
6. Detached trolley — orange rect at trolleyPos, only if trolleyState='empty' and trolleyPos != null
7. AGV rectangle — colored rect at agvPos with heading arrow
8. Attached trolley — smaller rect centered on AGV, only if trolleyState='carrying'
9. Action indicator — text label + progress arc above AGV during action_pause
10. HUD overlay — step counter, phase, speed on canvas

action_indicator.pickup: Label 'PICKUP' in green above AGV + green progress arc
action_indicator.release: Label 'RELEASE' in orange above AGV + orange progress arc
action_indicator.exchange: Label 'EXCHANGE' in cyan above AGV + cyan progress arc

rendering.active_node_pulse: White ring at target node, radius oscillates using sin(time * 4)

controls.play_pause: Button toggles ▶ Play / ⏸ Pause. Space bar shortcut.
controls.restart: Resets walker to initial state. Works from any phase.
controls.agv_speed_px: Number input (px/s in image space). Default 120.

player_controls.status_badge: Shows current phase: IDLE | MOVING | PICKUP | RELEASE | EXCHANGE | DONE
player_controls.step_counter: Shows 'step N / M' where N = currentStep, M = sequence.length

file_io.load_json: <input type=file accept=.json> in top load bar — populates nodes + sequence, resets walker
file_io.load_image: <input type=file accept=image/*> in top load bar — sets canvas background
file_io.no_export: Player is view-only. No save needed.

zoom_pan.note: Canvas height = window.innerHeight - 96 (48px top bar + 48px toolbar)

implementation_phases.name: Canvas + file loading
tasks: HTML: canvas + top load bar + bottom toolbar
Image load → fit to available canvas area
JSON load → parse NODES + SEQUENCE (with backward compat)
Draw static scene: nodes, sequence path lines

implementation_phases.name: AGV movement
tasks: sequence_walker: moving phase only (no trolley yet)
AGV rect drawn at agvPos with computed heading

implementation_phases.name: Trolley + action logic
tasks: Action indicator: text label + progress arc

implementation_phases.name: Player controls + polish
tasks: HUD: step info drawn on canvas
